posts.source_basis: approved top-post theme: proof beats generic prompting
posts.text:
Stop asking AI to guess what your audience wants.

Start with the posts your audience already rewarded.

That one change turns AI from a slot machine into a daily operating system.

posts.source_basis: approved top-post theme: systems compound better than prompts
posts.text:
A prompt is useful once.

A workflow is useful every morning.

The difference is whether your best old posts become raw material for the next batch.

The best content system is not more inspiration.

It is a clean loop:

1. Find what already worked
2. Reuse the signal
3. Review the candidates
4. Schedule with receipts

fallback_reason: Redacted public example only. No live Threadify schedule, account write, Brain write, or advanced ranking was performed.
